nodes.name: 聖佩德羅省 (巴拉圭)
nodes.summary: 聖佩德羅省 (巴拉圭)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括小拟䳍、Henna-capped foliage-gleaner，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Henna-capped foliage-gleaner
nodes.summary: Henna-capped foliage-gleaner（Henna-capped foliage-gleaner，学名 Clibanornis rectirostris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The species is presumably threatened by selective logging and agricultural conversion of forested areas within the Brazilian planalto, and more information is required regarding population size and trends." It is rather poorly known and considered rare to uncommon
